content.math_content: \begin{array}{l} F O V _ {h o r i z o n t a l} = 6 4 m m \\ A c c u r a c y _ {V i s i o n \_ T o o l} = \frac {1}{4} p i x e l \\ \# \text {P i x e l s} _ {\text {h o r i z o n t a l}} = 1 6 0 0 \text {p i x e l s} \\ \text {A c c u r a c y} _ {\text {h o r i z o n t a l}} = \frac {\text {F O V} \times \text {A c c u r a c y} _ {\text {V i s i o n} - \text {T o o l}}}{\# \text {P i x e l s}} \\ \end{array}
\text {A c c u r a c y} _ {\text {h o r i z o n t a l}} = \frac {6 4 \times (\frac {1}{4} \times 2) p i x e l}{1 6 0 0 p i x e l s}
